notes: Boss Rush escalation. FIXED: boss bullets vanished at half-range — lifetime extended from 1.6s to 5-6s so shots fly to the arena walls. NEW per-layer attack unlocks (all difficulties): L1 outer broken → HOMING MISSILES (3-6 tracking projectiles per volley, every 5.5s Easy / 1.8s Brutal), L2 middle broken → AOE BOMBS (lobbed explosives, 200px radius, 1-3 per volley), core phase → ROTATING LASER SWEEP (continuous beam, 80 DPS on contact). Stacks with the v0.5.3 patterns — by core phase EVERYTHING fires at once. Even Easy now requires real dodging from layer 1 onward — no more turtling in a corner.
